name: Kids' Activities
description: Every kid's season in one place — practices, games, and rehearsals with times and locations, coach contacts, and the gear checklist so nothing gets left behind.

source.query: SELECT s.id AS id, a.name AS title, COALESCE(NULLIF(s.location, ''), a.location) AS subtitle, COALESCE(NULLIF(s.start_time, ''), s.session_date) AS when_at, a.member_id AS member_id FROM app_kids_activities__sessions s JOIN app_kids_activities__activities a ON a.id = s.activity_id AND a.archived = 0 WHERE s.session_date = :today ORDER BY s.start_time LIMIT 20
